title: Understanding Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments: A Plain-Language Breakdown
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator from Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya struggling to sell ebooks, courses, or design assets due to PayPal restrictions? Do you want to accept crypto payments without the hassle of KYC requirements or multiple payment processor accounts? Unchained Commerce is here to help you bypass the limitations and get paid for your creative work. In this post, we'll break down the process of selling design assets with crypto payments and how you can use our tools to make it happen.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling design assets with crypto payments is a game-changer for digital creators in restricted countries. With the rise of cryptocurrencies, it's now possible to accept payments without the need for PayPal, Stripe, or other traditional payment processors. This means you can focus on creating high-quality digital products without worrying about the payment limitations. Our tools at Unchained Commerce make it easy to set up a crypto payment system that integrates seamlessly with your existing workflow.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind crypto payments is based on the blockchain, which allows for secure and transparent transactions. When a customer makes a payment, the transaction is processed through our payment processor, NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins. Our Web3 Wallet Connect tool ($19.99) makes it easy to integrate a frontend wallet into your website, allowing customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. The transaction is then verified and delivered instantly to the customer.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Our solution is built for digital creators who are struggling to sell their products due to payment restrictions. Whether you're an ebook author, course creator, or designer, our tools help you bypass the limitations and get paid for your work. With our solution, you can focus on creating high-quality products without worrying about the payment process. We also cater to solo developers who want to build crypto-native digital product stores, providing them with the necessary infrastructure to succeed.
By using our solution, you can bypass PayPal restrictions and accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our solution consists of three main components: the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and the Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine is the backend that handles automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Web3 Wallet Connect is the frontend wallet integration that allows customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management, making it easy to track your sales and customers.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand how to sell design assets with crypto payments, it's time to take action. Start by signing up for a free trial on our website (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html) and setting up your shop. Next, purchase our Web3 Wallet Connect tool ($19.99) to integrate a frontend wallet into your website. Finally, start creating and selling your digital products, knowing that you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies. With our solution, you can focus on what you do best - creating high-quality digital products.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell ebooks and courses without PayPal? Yes, you can sell ebooks and courses without PayPal by using our solution at Unchained Commerce. Our tools allow you to bypass the payment restrictions and accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies. We support over 300 coins, including BTC, ETH, USDT, and SOL.
Our Web3 Wallet Connect tool ($19.99) makes it easy to integrate a frontend wallet into your website, allowing customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency.

Our Web3 Wallet Connect tool ($19.99) makes it easy to integrate a frontend wallet into your website, allowing customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency.

To start selling design assets with crypto payments, follow these steps: purchase our Core Shop Engine ($49.99) and Web3 Wallet Connect tool ($19.99), set up your shop on our website, integrate a frontend wallet into your website using Web3 Wallet Connect, and start creating and selling your digital products. With our solution, you can focus on what you do best - creating high-quality digital products.
